_note: All token values confirmed from Figma get_design_context on nodes 7295:67 (Default) and 7295:80 (Typing). Cross-referenced against Driver App usage node 3100:11790.

--surface/neutral/sunken.description: Wrapper background color. Note: Driver App uses --surface/neutral/bg-sunken (with 'bg-') for the same value — flag for token alignment.

--spacing-8.description: Top padding of the wrapper and gap between input pill and send button

--chat-input/border-default.description: Input pill border color in Default state

--chat-input/border-active.description: Input pill border color in Typing state

fontFamily.description: Font family for both placeholder and input text

--button/secondary/bg-default.description: Send button background in Default state (secondary / ghost style)

--button/secondary/border-active.description: Send button border in Default state (transparent)

--button/default/bg-default.description: Send button background in Typing state (filled dark)

--button/default/border-active.description: Send button border in Typing state

icon.name: Customer-Icon/up-top
icon.description: Up-arrow icon displayed inside the send button
